Forget your flair vs. pure striker debates today. Back then, it was Henry vs. Van Nistelrooy for Premier League supremacy!

One was a dazzling creator & scorer who redefined the forward role (175 PL goals, 74 assists). The other, a cold-blooded assassin who lived purely for the 6-yard box (95 PL goals in just 150 games). Which legend truly gave defenders sleepless nights? The numbers paint distinct pictures of dominance!

"High press" is the buzzword today, but let's go back! Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan in the late 80s were masters of it. Their zonal marking and relentless off-the-ball work redefined defending. They hunted in packs, suffocating opponents. Pure tactical genius that changed the game forever. #Tactics #ACMilan #FootballHistory

Talk about an UNMATCHED legacy! 🤯

Samuel Eto'o isn't just a legend, he's a UNIQUE history-maker.

He's the only player EVER to win back-to-back European Trebles with two different clubs: Barcelona (2009) & Inter Milan (2010).

A truly generational African talent. Did we appreciate this insane feat enough at the time?! 👑 #Eto #AfricanFootball #History #UCL
